provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Prohibited Imports (Tanzania) (Coffee) Order. In this Order "coffee" means cherry, dried cherry, berries or beans or parts thereof of the coffee species and includes clean coffee, parchment coffee, lights, triage, buni and hulled buni.

(1) No coffee shall be imported into Tanzania except by the Tanzania Coffee Board or under and in accordance with a permit in that behalf issued by the Board. (2) No coffee shall be imported into Tanzania unless it is accompanied by a Certificate of origin issued in accordance with the provisions of the International Coffee Agreement.

Without prejudice to the generality thereof, the provisions of paragraph 2 of this order shall apply to coffee imported in transit, or for transhipment.
